title: Exposed Edge / Management Console
description: A management, edge, search, broker, CI/CD, or container-related console appears reachable from the external surface.
impact: Externally reachable management consoles can materially increase exploitation and credential attack risk, especially when they front infrastructure or orchestration platforms.
likelihood: Medium to High depending on authentication strength, patch level, and intended exposure.
recommendations: Restrict console exposure to trusted networks or VPN paths.
Review MFA, SSO, and administrative access controls for all exposed panels.
Validate versioning and patch posture for the exposed management surface.
